etymology: Gabriel = God is my strength; Baines = bones
wordplay_note: The strong-boned angel of the paranoid clan
card_description: Gabriel Baines (meaning "Gabriel = God is my strength; Baines = bones") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Clans of the Alphane Moon*. Paranoid leader of the Pare clan on Alphane Moon. Name note: The strong-boned angel of the paranoid clan. Mental illness as social organization — each diagnosis becomes a tribe. First appears in *Clans of the Alphane Moon*.

reference.brief: Paranoid leader of the Pare clan on Alphane Moon
reference.etymology: Gabriel = God is my strength; Baines = bones
reference.significance: Mental illness as social organization — each diagnosis becomes a tribe
